body.content:
Trains & Routes | JR-EAST
# Trains & Routes
A variety of trains run through the JR EAST area.
There are three main types. See the video below to learn more.
![Video thumbnail](https://www.jreast.co.jp/multi/traininformation/img/movie_thumb_types_of_train.png)
[![Embedded YouTube video](https://img.youtube.com/vi/O5lldOcRiE4/0.jpg)](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=O5lldOcRiE4)
## Recommended trains
* [![nex Image](https://www.jreast.co.jp/multi/img/top/img_rtrain_nex.jpg)
### Narita Express
](https://www.jreast.co.jp/en/multi/nex/)
* [![Joyful Train Image](https://www.jreast.co.jp/multi/img/top/img_rtrain_joyful.jpg)
### Joyful Trains
](https://www.jreast.co.jp/en/multi/joyful/)
